mapper.sql: SELECT fp.id, fp.author_id AS authorId, fp.title, fp.summary, fp.content, fp.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, fp.tags AS tagIds, fp.nickname, fp.avatar, ua.nickname AS authorNickname, ua.avatar AS authorAvatar, fp.view_count AS viewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ) AS commentCount, fp.status, fp.is_pinned AS isPinned, fp.is_featured AS isFeatured, fp.create_time AS createTime, fp.update_time AS updateTime, GREATEST( COALESCE(fp.last_activity_time, fp.update_time, fp.create_time), COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(c.create_time) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ), fp.create_time ) ) AS lastActivityTime FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN category c ON fp.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON fp.author_id = ua.id

where.if: AND ( fp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, fp.is_featured DESC, commentCount DESC, fp.view_count DESC, lastActivityTime DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_featured DESC, fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post( author_id, title, summary, content, category_id, tags, nickname, email, avatar, view_count, status, is_pinned, is_featured, create_time, update_time, last_activity_time ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{categoryId}, #{tags}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, #{isPinned}, #{isFeatured}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{lastActivityTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET is_pinned = #{isPinned}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, category_id = #{categoryId}, tags = #{tags}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
